sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hop (event_time DateTime, data String);
INSERT INTO test_hop (event_time, data) VALUES (now(), 'event1'), (now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, 'event2'), (now() - INTERVAL 2 DAY, 'event3');
SELECT hop(event_time, INTERVAL '12' HOUR, INTERVAL '1' DAY) FROM test_hop;
UPDATE test_hop SET data = 'updated_event' WHERE event_time = now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT event_time, data FROM test_hop WHERE hop(event_time, INTERVAL '1' HOUR, INTERVAL '2' HOURS) IS NOT NULL;
